data.title: U.A.W. ahead in vote at Ford & SK On battery venture. Narrow majority but outcome uncertain due to contested ballots.
data.description: The U.A.W. secured a slight majority in their attempt to represent workers at a factory jointly owned by Ford and SK On, though the final outcome remains uncertain due to contested ballots.

data.title: Global Live Entertainment Market expected to reach USD 859 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.4%. Industry trends include rise of AI in performances, mental health-focused events, and cause-driven entertainment. Opportunities in emerging markets like Asia-Pacific and Latin America.
data.description: The article discusses a research report by Custom Market Insights on the global Live Entertainment Market, highlighting key segments including types of events, regions, and trends. In 2024, the market was valued at approximately USD 465.9 Billion, expected to reach USD 535.4 Billion in 2025, and projected to hit USD 859 Billion by 2034, with a CAGR of about 5.4%. The market is evolving with technological advancements like AR/VR and live streaming, catering to consumer preferences. Key trends include mental health-focused events, AI-enhanced performances, holographic concerts, and cause-driven entertainment. The market is also influenced by global cultural exchanges and emerging markets. The report covers revenue estimates, company profiles, growth factors, and recent trends in different regions. Strengthened emotional connections with audiences, tailored event experiences, and social activism are shaping the future of live entertainment.

data.title: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) to disclose Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 4, 2025, 8:00 a.m ET. Earnings call at 9:00 a.m ET. Webcast available. Register for the call.
data.description: ESTERO, Florida - The Company Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: HTZ) is set to release its third-quarter 2025 financial results on Tuesday, November 4, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. ET, followed by an earnings call at 9:00 a.m. ET. The call can be accessed via a live webcast on the Company’s Investor Relations webpage at https://ir.hertz.com. For those joining by phone, registration is required through the provided link: Hertz Q3 2025 earnings teleco registration.
